title: Parse dst and perform lookup_route in mesh_to_mesh
description: In rust/lichen-gateway/src/gateway.rs:130 update mesh_to_mesh to extract dst using field::DST_OFFSET (lichen-core/src/ipv6.rs:16), call self.rpl_node.router.lookup_route(&dst) (lichen-node/src/routing.rs:857 delegating to lichen-rpl/src/routing.rs:1254 RoutingTable::lookup). Handle None as drop. Reference spec/05-routing.md:147.
